title: Project Coordinator (M&E / Lighting) – Up to $3,800 + AWS
description:
• Position    : Project Coordinator (M&E / Lighting) – Up to $3,800 + AWS
  • Location   : Kaki Bukit (Between Ubi & Kaki Bukit MRT)
  • Working hours  : Monday to Friday | 8.30am to 6.00pm
  • Salary (commensurate with experience)   : Basic up to $3,800 + AWS + Bonus of Average 1-2 months + 14 Days Annual Leaves + Medical Leaves + Dental Benefits + Birthday Allowance
  • Duration   : Permanent   
  • Industry   : Lighting Solutions    

Main Responsibilities:

  • Prepare product samples, product information data and all related project material requirement operational support.
  • Liaise with suppliers & customers and monitor materials and site delivery ordering is arranged in a timely manner so that projects are delivered on time.
  • Attend site meetings where necessary to co-ordinate with consultants, developers and contractors and to understand project requirements.
  • Enjoy working in a fast paced and exciting environment with a good ability to manage timelines and people.


Requirements:

  • Min. NTC2 or Diploma in Mechanical Engineering / Electrical Engineering / Interior Design / Building Services / Architectural / Sustainability Design.
  • Must have initiative; be able to think out of the box & enjoy working as a team and individually.
  • Experience in project lighting industry or related M&E is a bonus, or events or project co-ordination work experience would be helpful.
  • Bilingual in English and Mandarin to communicate with clients who can only converse in Mandarin. 

Email to: chloe@searchpersonnel.com.sg

***We do not charge our candidates any referral fee nor bind them with any contract.***

Chloe Ong

Associate Consulting Director (APAC)

Reg no.: R22105510

postedCompany.description:
SEARCH PERSONNEL PRIVATE LIMITED

 

Search Personnel is an established, leading and reputable recruitment company that brings effective services to individuals and organisations with a sense of urgency and commitment.


The thought behind Search Personnel is to deliver a specialized, high quality recruitment service.


With Search Personnel you can expect a level of quality and professionalism from experts who know recruitment and understand the market. With a team of experienced recruitment consultants, we can exploit into years of local recruitment experience and expertise. This enables us to bring the best roles and the best candidates together.


Our Services:

  • Executive Search (Headhunting)
  • Permanent Staffing
  • Payroll Processing Service
  • Contract Staffing
  • Temporary Staffing and Casual Workers
  • Foreign Recruitment (Overseas placements)

Awarded:
SME100 Awards 2020 - Singapore's Fast Moving Companies


Awarded:

  • Best Recruitment Portal – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2019
  • Best Staffing Firm – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2020
  • Best Mid-Management Recruitment Firm – (Singapore) – Bronze in 2020
  • Best Recruitment Firm – Mid-management roles RM8000 - RM15000 per month (Malaysia) – Gold in 2017 and Bronze in 2020
  • Best Recruitment Firm – Non-management roles under RM8000 per month (Malaysia) – Silver in 2018
  • Best Executive Search Firm – (Malaysia) – Bronze Award in 2019 and 2020

Voted by our valued clients and the public, HR Vendors of the Year Awards is one of Asia’s largest award shows dedicated to celebrating the achievements of organizations that do their best in serving the HR professionals.


We are not only providing recruitment services but also solutions to employers in talent management, from employee’s on-boarding, performance management, to retention.


Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Search Personnel Private Limited for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

hiringCompany.description:
Lumitron is a Lighting Specialist Supplier, providing lighting solutions to all types of projects in Singapore, from residential and commercial projects to large scale government type related projects. 

With over 40 years of history and experience in the market, we are one of the leading pioneers in the lighting landscape of Singapore.  Our team is made up of a strong management team who gives each and every individual the autonomy and responsibility to make decisions and learn and grow together. We do not stop you from trying out new ideas if it makes effective time and cost sense. We believe in nurturing and helping every individual who join us to grow their career and future with us and do not limit your ability to move beyond your scope of work. 

If you would like a future where you can learn about lights and be able to make your own decisions and build your own team, join us as we expand and grow together!
hiringCompany.name: LUMITRON PTE. LIMITED
